title: Technical Specification - Heat Exchanger Frame
subject: Technical Specification Package - Heat Exchanger Frame
body: Sharing the specification package for the frame revision under evaluation. This is not a clean RFQ yet, but the team needs the document in the system.
description: Specification document with engineering-style terminology and partial extraction.

attachments.content:
# Technical Specification

Document Reference: HXF-620-REV2
Material: Structural steel S275JR
Operating Conditions: Outdoor installation, coastal atmosphere
Delivery Deadline: 2026-06-01

This datasheet defines frame geometry, corrosion allowance, coating expectations and lifting constraints for the heat exchanger support frame.
